creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks!  However, please don't paste the shar 
archive in a mail message; the tabs are usually screwed by 
this.  Put a pointer to the shar somewhere or something like 
that to avoid that problem.  Also, why did you disable the 
shared libs (I didn't change this, but this behavior looks 
broken to me), and why did you say people must do ``make configure'' 
as root (I removed this message)?
